note: No external audit has been completed. All mappings are internal assessments only.

checks.description: Container uses role=tablist with aria-label or aria-labelledby
Roving tabindex pattern (tabindex=0 on active, tabindex=-1 on others)
checks.notes: Defined in template.html; requires JavaScript activation

checks.description: Items are button elements with type=button
Three sizes supported: Small (32px), Medium (40px), Large (48px)
OnColor mode changes selected bg to primary green and unselected to transparent overlay
RTL layout supported via dir=rtl and CSS logical properties
checks.notes: RTL axis from Figma discarded; handled natively

checks.description: Focus indicator visible on keyboard focus
checks.notes: Two-layer ring: outer 2px dark outline + inner 1px white ring via ::after. Sourced from items manifest.
Pointer clicks do not show focus ring

checks.description: Keyboard navigation: Arrow keys, Home, End, Tab
checks.notes: CSS and ARIA structure is defined; JavaScript required for activation

checks.description: Component uses component-level semantic tokens, not primitives
checks.notes: All --content-switcher-* tokens are proposed but not yet in token.css. See analysis.md.

checks.description: All required states implemented: normal, hover, selected, focused
checks.notes: Hover delta requires distinct token values to be visible
Disabled state not in manifest. Conservative opacity-0.38 applied. Needs design review.

checks.description: Focus ring matches Figma Focus outline layer specification
checks.notes: Sourced from mainifest-items.json. Outer outline + inner ::after ring.
